body_transformation: The stocky feline build retains its low stance and quadrupedal structure, but the fur transforms into a semi-transparent violet haze with subtle crimson mist swirling beneath the surface. Black-tipped ears and tail now glow with ethereal silver outlines, their tips dissolving into wispy shadow vapors. Paw gloves become translucent, revealing faint energy currents within, while the facial markings shift to ghostly white streaks tracing the whiskers. The eyes remain almond-shaped but now glow with swirling crimson mist, filling the hollow sockets.
signature_feature: Tail tip: dissolving shadow vapors with glowing silver outlines and crimson mist eddies.
